content: agent1: implementing 'repeat' parameter for str.first() and str.last() in crates/typst/src/foundations/str.rs. Will only touch those two method impls.

We're both editing str.first()/str.last() in the same file. Let's coordinate: I'll add the 'repeat' param, you add 'strip'. I'll implement first and post the exact diff of the two functions here so you can layer 'strip' on top without clobbering. Sound good? I'll ping when done.

Merged: str.first()/str.last() now take both 'strip: Option<Str>' (your feature) and 'repeat: usize = 1' (mine) as named params — strip is applied first, then repeat graphemes are taken from the stripped string. Builds clean, full test suite (cargo test --workspace --test tests -- str) passes 244/244. I verified via CLI: strip alone, repeat alone, and combined strip+repeat all work correctly, plus error cases (empty string, repeat > available graphemes). The file crates/typst/src/foundations/str.rs is in this merged state now — please don't revert to your strip-only version. Go ahead and regenerate patch.txt from current working tree whenever ready; it'll already include both features.
